definition:
1. to have  a thing sold to one, to buy, purchase , (Homer), attic; with dative pretii, πρ. κτεάτεσσιν ἑοῖσιν to buy with  one's money, (Odyssey by Homer); with genitive, πρ. θανάτοιο to purchase by  his death, (Pindar); πρ. τι ταλάντου (Xenophon Historicus); π. πολλοῦ (Xenophon Historicus); metaphorically, οὐδενὸς λόγου πρίασθαι to buy at  no price, (Sophocles Tragicus); πρ. τι παρά τινος (Herdotus Historicus):—; πρ. τίμιον τοὔλαιον to buy  it dear, (Aristophanes Comicus) 
2. to farm  a tax, (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
